message:
fix: avoid close/reopen cycle for agent beads on Dolt backend (gt-14b8o)

The close/reopen cycle for agent beads fails on Dolt backends because
bd delete uses tombstone operations (not supported) and bd reopen may
fail with Dolt-specific errors. This causes polecats to be permanently
bricked when names are reused after nuke.

Two-pronged fix:

1. Nuke path: Replace CloseAndClearAgentBead with new ResetAgentBeadForReuse
   which clears all mutable fields but keeps the bead OPEN with
   agent_state="nuked". This avoids the close/reopen cycle entirely.

2. Sling path: Make CreateOrReopenAgentBead more robust by using bd show
   to detect existing beads and handle both open and closed states
   explicitly, with a fallback to bd update --status=open if bd reopen
   fails on Dolt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
